text: Despite placement of a pigtail drain and TPA, the effusion failed to drain.
We took her to the operating room for a VATS decortication.
The rind on the lung was too thick to decorticate and we converted to a thoracotomy.
This is the beginning of the decortication.
peeling the rind off of the lung.
We make careful progress pushing the lung away from the rind.
The whole lung that you see is the left lower lobe.
The left upper lobe was relatively intact and is hidden in the shadows.
This is the medial basal segment of the lower lobe adjacent to the heart.
With the decortication complete, we will show you the lung inflate.
